# API Reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Core API

Primary objects and solvers.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [hardware](hardware.qmd#mlsysim.hardware) |  |
| [models](models.qmd#mlsysim.models) |  |
| [infra](infra.qmd#mlsysim.infra) |  |
| [systems](systems.qmd#mlsysim.systems) |  |
| [core](core.qmd#mlsysim.core) |  |
| [core.solver.SingleNodeSolver](core.solver.SingleNodeSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.SingleNodeSolver) | Resolves single-node hardware Roofline bounds and feasibility. |
| [core.solver.ServingSolver](core.solver.ServingSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.ServingSolver) | Analyzes the two-phase LLM serving lifecycle: Pre-fill vs. Decoding. |
| [core.solver.DistributedSolver](core.solver.DistributedSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.DistributedSolver) | Resolves fleet-wide communication, synchronization, and pipelining constraints. |
| [core.solver.DataSolver](core.solver.DataSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.DataSolver) | Analyzes the 'Data Wall' — the throughput bottleneck between storage and compute. |
| [core.solver.ScalingSolver](core.solver.ScalingSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.ScalingSolver) | Analyzes the 'Scaling Physics' of model training (Chinchilla Laws). |
| [core.solver.OrchestrationSolver](core.solver.OrchestrationSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.OrchestrationSolver) | Analyzes Cluster Orchestration and Queueing (Little's Law). |
| [core.solver.CompressionSolver](core.solver.CompressionSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.CompressionSolver) | Analyzes model compression trade-offs (Accuracy vs. Efficiency). |
| [core.solver.SustainabilitySolver](core.solver.SustainabilitySolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.SustainabilitySolver) | Calculates Datacenter-scale Sustainability metrics. |
| [core.solver.EconomicsSolver](core.solver.EconomicsSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.EconomicsSolver) | Calculates Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) including Capex and Opex. |
| [core.solver.ContinuousBatchingSolver](core.solver.ContinuousBatchingSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.ContinuousBatchingSolver) | Analyzes production LLM serving with Continuous Batching and PagedAttention. |
| [core.solver.WeightStreamingSolver](core.solver.WeightStreamingSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.WeightStreamingSolver) | Analyzes Wafer-Scale inference (e.g., Cerebras CS-3) using Weight Streaming. |
| [core.solver.TailLatencySolver](core.solver.TailLatencySolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.TailLatencySolver) | Analyzes queueing delays and P99 tail latency for deployed inference (M/M/c). |
| [core.solver.ReliabilitySolver](core.solver.ReliabilitySolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.ReliabilitySolver) | Calculates Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF) and optimal checkpointing intervals. |
| [core.solver.CheckpointSolver](core.solver.CheckpointSolver.qmd#mlsysim.core.solver.CheckpointSolver) | Analyzes checkpoint I/O burst penalties and MFU impact. |
